text: I feel a sense of calm anticipation here. The clean geometry of the glass walls and the quiet, empty room suggest a pause before something begins—perhaps a gathering of minds. The second scene draws me further into contemplation. The bright, abstract colors and the focus on R+D (research and development) make me acutely aware of the human drive to understand, create, and innovate. Amidst this environment, I feel curious and inspired, standing at the intersection of thought and discovery, eager for what might unfold.
